name: data-warehouse-analytics-retention-cohort-analyzer
description: T178 RetentionCohortAnalyzer — ANALYTICS_ENGINE archetype. Retention cohorts tenant-scoped. periodDays from FREEDOM config retention window. Emits RetentionCohortGenerated.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: periodDays from FREEDOM config (NEVER hardcoded), tenant-scoped cohorts, RetentionCohortGenerated emission
Retrieve ANALYTICS_ENGINE arch pattern + retention-cohort + freedom-config-period + tenant-scoped-cohort patterns for T178

Break T178 into: consume queue event → load periodDays from FREEDOM config retention window → build cohort time windows → count retained users per period → storeDocument(retentionCohort) → emit RetentionCohortGenerated

Generate retention-cohort-analyzer.service.ts — queue consumer, loads periodDays from FREEDOM config retention window key (NEVER hardcoded as 7, 30, etc.). Cohort definitions tenant-scoped from ALS. Computes retention percentages per period window. DNA-8: storeDocument(retentionCohort) BEFORE emitting RetentionCohortGenerated.
Named check validation: period_days_from_freedom_config, not_hardcoded_period, tenant_scoped_cohorts, retention_cohort_generated_emitted, store_before_emit
Score generated code 0-100 against T178 iron rules: FREEDOM config periodDays, tenant isolation, DNA-8, RetentionCohortGenerated event
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=freedom-period-days+tenant-scoped+store-before-emit, rejected=hardcoded-7-or-30-days OR cross-tenant-cohort OR emit-before-store. curriculumTier=1.
